Message.SourceString: Thanks for your help, it'll be so nice to escape this mirror realm nightmare prison. Don't worry, I'm not going to go on some sinister evil rampage or anything. Honest.
Message.LocalizedString: Thanks for your help, it'll be so nice to escape this mirror realm nightmare prison. Don't worry, I'm not going to go on some sinister evil rampage or anything. Honest.

Message.SourceString: A mysterious spellbook, from Agatha's Magical Delivery Service.
Message.LocalizedString: A mysterious spellbook, from Agatha's Magical Delivery Service.

Message.SourceString: For each candle you light, you'll rekindle a memory which will help me reconnect myself to this world and pull myself back through. I'll give you a spark to reignite them, just a small piece of my soul so the candles will ignite when you find them.
Message.LocalizedString: For each candle you light, you'll rekindle a memory which will help me reconnect myself to this world and pull myself back through. I'll give you a spark to reignite them, just a small piece of my soul so the candles will ignite when you find them.

Message.SourceString: Wonderful, I can start getting the ritual ready on my end. I just need something to tether myself back to your side of reality. I'll need you to rekindle my memories, quite literally.
Message.LocalizedString: Wonderful, I can start getting the ritual ready on my end. I just need something to tether myself back to your side of reality. I'll need you to rekindle my memories, quite literally.

Message.SourceString: Brilliant stuff! I can get the spell going now. I should be out of here in... what... a week or so.
Message.LocalizedString: Brilliant stuff! I can get the spell going now. I should be out of here in... what... a week or so.

Message.SourceString: When one lives as long as I have, one's memories get a little overcrowded and sometimes you just need to put them somewhere for safekeeping. I've left a few of mine as "memorial candles" in each region I've visited.
Message.LocalizedString: When one lives as long as I have, one's memories get a little overcrowded and sometimes you just need to put them somewhere for safekeeping. I've left a few of mine as "memorial candles" in each region I've visited.

Message.SourceString: *A small greenish flame passes from the mirror and into the palm of your hand. It feels full of sorrow, rage and boundless grief.*
Message.LocalizedString: *A small greenish flame passes from the mirror and into the palm of your hand. It feels full of sorrow, rage and boundless grief.*

Message.SourceString: Hello?
Message.LocalizedString: Hello?

Message.SourceString: Wait! A person? An actual, real life person and not some shambling nightmare picking rubbish out of its teeth? Hello! Hello! Oh, also, help?
Message.LocalizedString: Wait! A person? An actual, real life person and not some shambling nightmare picking rubbish out of its teeth? Hello! Hello! Oh, also, help?

Message.SourceString: For each candle you light, you'll rekindle a memory which will help me reconnect myself to this world and pull myself back through. I'll give you a spark to reignite them, just a small piece of my soul so the candles will ignite when you find them.
Message.LocalizedString: For each candle you light, you'll rekindle a memory which will help me reconnect myself to this world and pull myself back through. I'll give you a spark to reignite them, just a small piece of my soul so the candles will ignite when you find them.

Message.SourceString: I just need you to grab a few things, so I can get myself out of this mirror.
Message.LocalizedString: I just need you to grab a few things, so I can get myself out of this mirror.

Message.SourceString: She even gave me the ritual to release myself to...err... taunt me, yes, taunt me. It's quite simple to resolve, really, it shouldn't take long.
Message.LocalizedString: She even gave me the ritual to release myself to...err... taunt me, yes, taunt me. It's quite simple to resolve, really, it shouldn't take long.

Message.SourceString: I just need you to grab a few things. Dragon blood, which should be plentiful. A copy of the spell from my old shop in Emberwood's windmill, and some spectral silver thread - my seamstress, Edna, can help you there.
Message.LocalizedString: I just need you to grab a few things. Dragon blood, which should be plentiful. A copy of the spell from my old shop in Emberwood's windmill, and some spectral silver thread - my seamstress, Edna, can help you there.

Message.SourceString: What? You don't need to stick around for that, I'm good now. I can stitch this mirror back together and then escape this reflective prison. You've done everything I need.
Message.LocalizedString: What? You don't need to stick around for that, I'm good now. I can stitch this mirror back together and then escape this reflective prison. You've done everything I need.

Message.SourceString: No flame seems to touch this wick, as though it burns from something else.
Message.LocalizedString: No flame seems to touch this wick, as though it burns from something else.

Message.SourceString: Oh, that you already have!
Message.LocalizedString: Oh, that you already have!

Message.SourceString: Great, that's all the bits I need! Thank you so much... I'll take those off your hands for now, just press them to the glass. It's weird, I know, but it won't hurt.
Message.LocalizedString: Great, that's all the bits I need! Thank you so much... I'll take those off your hands for now, just press them to the glass. It's weird, I know, but it won't hurt.

Message.SourceString: Great, that's all the bits I need! Thank you so much... I'll take those off your hands for now, just press them to the glass. It's weird, I know, but it won't hurt.
Message.LocalizedString: Great, that's all the bits I need! Thank you so much... I'll take those off your hands for now, just press them to the glass. It's weird, I know, but it won't hurt.

Message.SourceString: No flame seems to touch this wick, as though it burns from something else.
Message.LocalizedString: No flame seems to touch this wick, as though it burns from something else.

Message.SourceString: No flame seems to touch this wick, as though it burns from something else.
Message.LocalizedString: No flame seems to touch this wick, as though it burns from something else.

Message.SourceString: Well, there's nothing I can do until you give me the ingredients. Don't worry, I'll be right here until you change your mind... right...here...
Message.LocalizedString: Well, there's nothing I can do until you give me the ingredients. Don't worry, I'll be right here until you change your mind... right...here...

Message.SourceString: The soul ignites the candle. A memory that is not yours seeps into your thoughts. Your pour your rage into the heavens, corrupting the veil a god placed there to protect. Dark magic turns clouds into weapons, blasting settlements with spears of lightning. You laugh, a cold and bitter sound, at the nightmare you've wrought.
Message.LocalizedString: The soul ignites the candle. A memory that is not yours seeps into your thoughts. Your pour your rage into the heavens, corrupting the veil a god placed there to protect. Dark magic turns clouds into weapons, blasting settlements with spears of lightning. You laugh, a cold and bitter sound, at the nightmare you've wrought.

Message.SourceString: No flame seems to touch this wick, as though it burns from something else.
Message.LocalizedString: No flame seems to touch this wick, as though it burns from something else.

Message.SourceString: The soul ignites the candle. A memory that is not yours seeps into your thoughts. Your fingers are warm, though his body grows colder with each second. There is no breath in his lungs and once bright eyes are cold and empty. A sorrow like no other grasps icy fingers around your heart and mercy dies to its frigid touch.
Message.LocalizedString: The soul ignites the candle. A memory that is not yours seeps into your thoughts. Your fingers are warm, though his body grows colder with each second. There is no breath in his lungs and once bright eyes are cold and empty. A sorrow like no other grasps icy fingers around your heart and mercy dies to its frigid touch.

Message.SourceString: No flame seems to touch this wick, as though it burns from something else.
Message.LocalizedString: No flame seems to touch this wick, as though it burns from something else.

Message.SourceString: The soul ignites the candle. A memory that is not yours seeps into your thoughts. A shared meal, tougher than it should be. A monster avoided through quick wit and guile. A silent conversation worth more than a thousand words.
Message.LocalizedString: The soul ignites the candle. A memory that is not yours seeps into your thoughts. A shared meal, tougher than it should be. A monster avoided through quick wit and guile. A silent conversation worth more than a thousand words.

Message.SourceString: No flame seems to touch this wick, as though it burns from something else.
Message.LocalizedString: No flame seems to touch this wick, as though it burns from something else.

Message.SourceString: I need dragon blood, it's the blood of the enemy and that always has mystical significance. I read about it in a book once.
Message.LocalizedString: I need dragon blood, it's the blood of the enemy and that always has mystical significance. I read about it in a book once.

Message.SourceString: Spectral silver thread will help me stitch the mirror back together. My seamstress, Edna, can help you there. You can find her little cottage in the centre of Dragon's Run. She's...err... quite thin these days.
Message.LocalizedString: Spectral silver thread will help me stitch the mirror back together. My seamstress, Edna, can help you there. You can find her little cottage in the centre of Dragon's Run. She's...err... quite thin these days.

Message.SourceString: Finally I need a copy of the spell itself. Using morse code and a very clever pigeon, I managed to order a copy from Agatha's mail-order magic -- but it got sent back to my shop, in my windmill in Emberwood village.
Message.LocalizedString: Finally I need a copy of the spell itself. Using morse code and a very clever pigeon, I managed to order a copy from Agatha's mail-order magic -- but it got sent back to my shop, in my windmill in Emberwood village.

Message.SourceString: I'll need you to rekindle my memories, quite literally.
Message.LocalizedString: I'll need you to rekindle my memories, quite literally.

Message.SourceString: You have no room in your inventory for this book, you'll need to make some space and come back to it later.
Message.LocalizedString: You have no room in your inventory for this book, you'll need to make some space and come back to it later.

Message.SourceString: For each candle you light, you'll rekindle a memory which will help me reconnect myself to this world and pull myself back through. I'll give you a spark to reignite them, just a small piece of my soul so the candles will ignite when you find them.
Message.LocalizedString: For each candle you light, you'll rekindle a memory which will help me reconnect myself to this world and pull myself back through. I'll give you a spark to reignite them, just a small piece of my soul so the candles will ignite when you find them.

Message.SourceString: Here, take this as a thank you. Who knows, we might see each other on the other side sometime. Your side, I mean, not this one... that wasn't a threat, we're cool.
Message.LocalizedString: Here, take this as a thank you. Who knows, we might see each other on the other side sometime. Your side, I mean, not this one... that wasn't a threat, we're cool.

Message.SourceString: A mote of light runs between yourself and the skeleton and she turns her skull to face you and opens her arms out wide, expectantly.
Message.LocalizedString: A mote of light runs between yourself and the skeleton and she turns her skull to face you and opens her arms out wide, expectantly.

Message.SourceString: The mistress needssss...bring me a bar of silver, a spool of fine thread, a bottle of sacred oil, and six soul fragments and I shall weave what she needsssss.
Message.LocalizedString: The mistress needssss...bring me a bar of silver, a spool of fine thread, a bottle of sacred oil, and six soul fragments and I shall weave what she needsssss.

Message.SourceString: A mote of light runs between yourself and the skeleton and she turns her skull to face you and opens her arms out wide, expectantly.
Message.LocalizedString: A mote of light runs between yourself and the skeleton and she turns her skull to face you and opens her arms out wide, expectantly.

Message.SourceString: You have no room to take thisss thread. Return to me when space is made among your belongings.
Message.LocalizedString: You have no room to take thisss thread. Return to me when space is made among your belongings.

Message.SourceString: I've got a little something to thank you for your efforts so far, but you seem a bit overburdened. I'll hold on to it til you've got your hands a bit freer.
Message.LocalizedString: I've got a little something to thank you for your efforts so far, but you seem a bit overburdened. I'll hold on to it til you've got your hands a bit freer.

Message.SourceString: Well, there's nothing I can do until you give me the ingredients. Don't worry, I'll be right here until you change your mind... right...here...
Message.LocalizedString: Well, there's nothing I can do until you give me the ingredients. Don't worry, I'll be right here until you change your mind... right...here...

Message.SourceString: The skeleton returns to rest, leaving you without your thread.
Message.LocalizedString: The skeleton returns to rest, leaving you without your thread.

Message.SourceString: The skeleton performs a series of gestures, too quick and strange for your eyes to follow and then hands you a spool of spectral silver thread. The skeleton returns to rest.
Message.LocalizedString: The skeleton performs a series of gestures, too quick and strange for your eyes to follow and then hands you a spool of spectral silver thread. The skeleton returns to rest.

Message.SourceString: The soul ignites the candle. A memory that is not yours seeps into your thoughts. You've grown to like the antipoison's taste, a pick-me-up first thing in the morning. The cave is damp, but oddly comforting. The bodies of seven garou keep you warm  as they burn. You wonder if you have a future in potions.
Message.LocalizedString: The soul ignites the candle. A memory that is not yours seeps into your thoughts. You've grown to like the antipoison's taste, a pick-me-up first thing in the morning. The cave is damp, but oddly comforting. The bodies of seven garou keep you warm  as they burn. You wonder if you have a future in potions.

Message.SourceString: Wonderful, I can start getting the ritual ready on my end. I just need something to tether myself back to your side of reality. I'll need you to rekindle my memories, quite literally.
Message.LocalizedString: Wonderful, I can start getting the ritual ready on my end. I just need something to tether myself back to your side of reality. I'll need you to rekindle my memories, quite literally.

Message.SourceString: The soul ignites the candle. A memory that is not yours seeps into your thoughts. Distrustful eyes fall upon you. Scorn and derision from every corner. The priests shake their head at you. Only one face smiles back beneath a mask of bone.
Message.LocalizedString: The soul ignites the candle. A memory that is not yours seeps into your thoughts. Distrustful eyes fall upon you. Scorn and derision from every corner. The priests shake their head at you. Only one face smiles back beneath a mask of bone.

Message.SourceString: A... horrible necromancer trapped me in this mirror decades ago. Punishment for all my mistakes. I'm not saying I didn't deserve it, but it's been... well, an eternity, and I think I've served my time.
Message.LocalizedString: A... horrible necromancer trapped me in this mirror decades ago. Punishment for all my mistakes. I'm not saying I didn't deserve it, but it's been... well, an eternity, and I think I've served my time.

Message.SourceString: The soul ignites the candle. A memory that is not yours seeps into your thoughts. You stare into the mirror, guilt finally quelling the rage that always burns in your chest. The nightmare all around you, your fault, but who will punish you, if not yourself?
Message.LocalizedString: The soul ignites the candle. A memory that is not yours seeps into your thoughts. You stare into the mirror, guilt finally quelling the rage that always burns in your chest. The nightmare all around you, your fault, but who will punish you, if not yourself?

Message.SourceString: When one lives as long as I have, one's memories get a little overcrowded and sometimes you just need to put them somewhere for safekeeping. I've left a few of mine as "memorial candles" in each region I've visited.
Message.LocalizedString: When one lives as long as I have, one's memories get a little overcrowded and sometimes you just need to put them somewhere for safekeeping. I've left a few of mine as "memorial candles" in each region I've visited.

Message.SourceString: When one lives as long as I have, one's memories get a little overcrowded and sometimes you just need to put them somewhere for safekeeping. I've left a few of mine as "memorial candles" in each region I've visited.
Message.LocalizedString: When one lives as long as I have, one's memories get a little overcrowded and sometimes you just need to put them somewhere for safekeeping. I've left a few of mine as "memorial candles" in each region I've visited.
